title: Configuration Settings Compliance — CIS Benchmark Control Checks

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

app: Tenable Add-On for Splunk (Splunkbase 4060), SCAP/OVAL via HEC
spl:
index=compliance sourcetype=cis:assessment earliest=-7d control_result="FAIL" benchmark="CIS_Microsoft_Windows_Server_2022"
| stats count by hostname, control_id, severity
| sort - severity, - count
value: Ingests configuration assessment scan results for CM-6 configuration settings.
implementation: (1) Normalize control_id to CIS references; (2) join system owner lookup; (3) SLA remediations; (4) map to SC-7 for boundary controls when network-related.
visualization: Table (failed controls), Bar chart (by benchmark), Single value (fail count)
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
